basic_details.job_title: CSL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Serang / Engine Driver Posts
basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard (CSL) Serang / Engine Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website cochinshipyard.in. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the CSL Serang / Engine Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation of 3 years is applicable for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Serang / Lascar cum Serang Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021, Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Engine driver Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021
qualification.details: Serang on contract basis for CSL: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Serang / Lascar cum Serang Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021. Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Engine driver Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Serang on contract basis for CSL
Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Serang on contract basis for CSL
Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL

salary_details.details: Selected candidates for Serang / Engine Driver posts will receive Rs. 23,300/- per month (first year).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.cochin_shipyard: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Serang / Lascar cum Serang Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021, Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Engine driver Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021

content_sections.heading: CSL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSL Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Serang on contract basis for CSL
Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Serang on contract basis for CSL: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Serang / Lascar cum Serang Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021. Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL: Pass in VII standard and must possess valid Engine driver Certificate issued by the Competent Authority under the Inland Vessels Act 2021.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation of 3 years is applicable for OBC (Non Creamy Layer) candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Selected candidates for Serang / Engine Driver posts will receive Rs. 23,300/- per month (first year).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Cochin Shipyard (CSL). It is a prominent organization offering various opportunities in the maritime sector for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this CSL recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Serang on contract basis for CSL and Engine Driver on contract basis for CSL. These roles are crucial for the shipyard's operations.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are there for Serang / Engine Driver posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Serang / Engine Driver posts. This includes 6 for Serang and 2 for Engine Driver positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for CSL Serang / Engine Driver Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website within the specified dates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for the CSL Serang / Engine Driver posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the CSL Serang / Engine Driver posts is 22 July 2026. Applicants are advised to apply well in advance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General/OBC candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 200/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for Serang / Engine Driver posts at CSL?
faq.answer: The salary offered for Serang / Engine Driver posts is Rs. 23,300/- per month for the first year. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for CSL Serang / Engine Driver Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Serang / Engine Driver posts primarily involves a Practical test. Candidates will be evaluated based on their performance in this test.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be found on the Cochin Shipyard official website, www.cochinshipyard.in. A direct link is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
